     9→        "property_id": "PROP-W4B13-54",
    10→        "title": "Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for tb-006: Is BlobSidecarsByRoot deprecated protocol fully disabled after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS?",
    11→        "severity": "Low",
    12→        "mindset": "Boundary Guard",
    13→        "is_boundary_check": true,
    14→        "reachability": {
    15→          "classification": "external-reachable",
    16→          "entry_points": [
    17→            "P2P"
    18→          ],
    19→          "attacker_controlled": true,
    20→          "validation_layers": [],
    21→          "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope",
    22→          "notes": "Similar to PROP-0047 but for the by-root variant. Consistent deprecation behavior across both variants is critical."
    23→        },
    24→        "test_procedure": "1. Identify the BlobSidecarsByRoot request handler in the P2P layer. 2. Verify epoch calculation logic: confirm current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS triggers full protocol disablement. 3. During transition period (FULU_FORK_EPOCH <= current_epoch < FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS): verify only pre-Fulu blobs are served when requested by root. 4. After transition: send BlobSidecarsByRoot requests and verify the protocol returns appropriate error/rejection (not data). 5. Compare deprecation behavior with BlobSidecarsByRange to ensure consistency between both variants. 6. Test edge cases at exact epoch boundaries. 7. Verify no resource exhaustion possible via deprecated protocol requests.",
    25→        "bug_class": "Protocol Deprecation Enforcement",
    26→        "risk_category": "Tampering",
    27→        "notes": "Source: PROP-W4B13-54, Trust Boundary: tb-006, Source Invariant: p2p:SG-013:INV-001. Post-transition requests are minor resource waste. Inconsistent deprecation between by-range and by-root variants could confuse implementations."
    28→      },
    29→      "checklist_file": "outputs/02_PARTIAL_W7B8_1770351411.json",
    30→      "property_id": "PROP-W4B13-54"
    31→    },

        "test_procedure": "1. Identify the BlobSidecarsByRoot request handler in the P2P layer. 2. Verify epoch calculation logic: confirm current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS triggers full protocol disablement. 3. During transition period (FULU_FORK_EPOCH <= current_epoch < FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS): verify only pre-Fulu blobs are served when requested by root. 4. After transition: send BlobSidecarsByRoot requests and verify the protocol returns appropriate error/rejection (not data). 5. Compare deprecation behavior with BlobSidecarsByRange to ensure consistency between both variants. 6. Test edge cases at exact epoch boundaries. 7. Verify no resource exhaustion possible via deprecated protocol requests.",
